meta.notes: T1/T2/T3/T4 executed in a single continuous bash call — WALL_START and WALL_END in the same shell, no CC activity between runs. LLM overhead 0.154s is measurement noise. T3 Anthropic proxy hit 2x ReadTimeout on LLM synthesis → fell back to OpenAI; analysis succeeded. T3 sub-stage timings are precise (⏱ [TIMING] markers added to skill for this benchmark). TikTok native trending returned 0 in T4 — keyword fallback triggered. Token delta from session JSONL (13:03:57–13:10:57 UTC window, 60s pre-buffer); covers 11 CC messages.

test_input.name: social-trend-queries
test_input.description: fitness (TikTok+Instagram), cooking (X), analyze (T1 first URL), trending (general)

task.name: viral-trend-finder
task.purpose: Discover trending social content by niche across TikTok, Instagram, and X; deep-analyze video URLs via yt-dlp download → ffmpeg frame extraction → Gemini Vision per-frame → LLM synthesis; return storyboard + hook copy
task.expected_output: JSON with trend results (find/trending) or storyboard + success factors + hook copy (analyze) per test case

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills/viral-trend-finder/. Pre-flight: ffmpeg 7.0.2 (static binary), yt-dlp 2026.03.17, Pillow 12.2.0 installed before benchmark.

asset_acquisition.notes: No external benchmark assets. T3 video download (12180KB) is internal to the analyze pipeline.

steps.name: t1_find_fitness
steps.notes: find 'fitness' --platforms tiktok,instagram --count 5. Apify TikTok + Apify Instagram in parallel. Results: 18 trending videos. Top: @fitness.953 8.0M views (TikTok), @hananerech 6.6M views (TikTok). T3 URL: https://www.tiktok.com/@fitness.953/video/7575863220104170783

steps.name: t2_find_cooking_x
steps.notes: find 'cooking' --platforms x --count 5. RapidAPI Twitter search. Results: 5 trending posts. Top: @ThoughtCrimes80 4.4M views, @DudespostingWs 2.6M views. Note: X view counts here are actual video views (unlike prior run where likes were proxied).

steps.name: t3_analyze
steps.notes: analyze https://www.tiktok.com/@fitness.953/video/7575863220104170783. Video: 60s, 12180KB. Pipeline: yt-dlp metadata → download → ffmpeg 1fps (60 frames extracted, 20 sampled) → Gemini Vision ×20 (5 concurrent, 1/20 failed) → LLM synthesis. Anthropic proxy 2x ReadTimeout → OpenAI fallback; succeeded. Output: 10-shot storyboard, title='Grit and Glory: Fitness Challenge'. metadata_s=1.10 download_s=2.20 frame_extract_s=5.48 gemini_vision_s=23.00 llm_synthesis_s=217.81 shots=10 frames=20

steps.name: t4_trending
steps.notes: trending (no niche). TikTok native trending returned 0 → keyword fallback: 5 categories × 3 platforms = 15 parallel searches. Results: 10 trending videos. Top: 73.8M views (TikTok), 41.9M views (TikTok), 36.3M views (TikTok). X and Instagram below TikTok view threshold.

execution.notes: execution.total_s = T1+T2+T3+T4 (23.872+3.941+249.786+81.275). T3 dominated (249.8s): LLM synthesis with 2x Anthropic ReadTimeout + OpenAI fallback = 217.8s alone. Gemini Vision fast (23.0s for 20 frames at max_workers=5). TikTok native trending consistently returns 0 on this devbox.

delivery.notes: No CDN upload — local delivery. T1 stdout 15.7KB (18 results), T2 stdout 1.9KB (5 results), T3 stdout 8.7KB (storyboard JSON), T4 stdout 3.5KB (10 results). T3 report also saved to /tmp/.pikabot/viral-trend-finder/. Total ~30KB.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-cc-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. Token data included other tasks from the same Claude Code session.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
